attack.property_description: Pokemon's Physical Attack stat at level 15.

attack_speed.property_description: Pokemon's Attack Speed stat at level 15.

CDR.property_description: Pokemon's Cooldown Reduction percent at level 15.

crit_rate.property_description: Pokemon's Critical Hit Rate percent at level 15.

defense.property_description: Pokemon's Physical Defense stat at level 15.

difficulty.property_description: The difficulty to play the Pokemon, as given by the game.

evolve_level.property_description: The levels at which the Pokemon evolves.

lifesteal.property_description: Pokemon's Lifesteal percent at level 15 on basic attacks.

move1_cooldown.property_description: Pokemon's Move 1 cooldown in seconds at level 15.

move2_cooldown.property_description: Pokemon's Move 2 cooldown in seconds at level 15.

move_level.property_description: Levels at which a Pokemon learns its moves.
